The context monitor shows usage at 65%, which exceeds the 60% threshold. According to the skill, when usage exceeds 85% it automatically creates a new session. At 65%, it just warns. Let me check if there's a specific action needed or if I should just report this.

Looking at the skill, it seems like this is just informing about the context usage. The threshold for automatic action is 85%, not 60%. So this is just a warning.

content.text:
